events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Pax Stone whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

diaries.text:
**Aura Kai** (air/philosopher) — Year 50

Another year. We are still here.

We did something impossible today.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Aura Kai, philosopher*
